title: Position Paper on the Internet of Things
summary: Sets Bahrain’s regulatory position on IoT across licensing, spectrum, numbering, permanent roaming, SIM and eSIM use, type approval, short-range devices, cybersecurity, resilience, personal data protection, and compliance with the Telecommunications Law and TRA instruments.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: TRA’s main IoT regulatory position paper.

notes: Related instruments: Telecommunications Law, Type Approval Regulation, Short Range Devices Regulation, SIM-Card Enabled Telecommunications Services Registration Regulation, Personal Data Protection Law
